channel.title: Arcaea on Boring Game
channel.description: Recent content in Arcaea on Boring Game

item.title: Arcaea
item.description: Arcaea Last Update: 2025-12-25 我不知道做這張表要幹嘛，不過你想知道我的實力的話，也許這可以滿足你的好奇。 Future Track Name Clear Score Date inkar-usi PM 10000421 2022/01/15 Dement ~after legend~ PM 10000932 2022/03/26 Kanagawa Cyber Culvert Clear 9947014 2022/04/02 Infinity Heaven PM 10000800 2022/04/02 Red and Blue and Green Clear 9765972 2022/04/02 Sayonara Hatsukoi PM 10000635 2022/04/16 Fairytale FR 9987929 2022/04/16 NULCTRL FR 9916709 2022/05/07 qualia -ideaesthesia- FR 9966694 2022/05/07 next to you FR 9988620 2022/05/15 san skia FR 9981878 2022/06/25 Rise PM 10000759 2022/06/27 Suomi PM 10000799 2022/07/07 Diode PM 10000675 2022/07/11 Clotho and the stargazer PM 10000988 2022/07/15 DDD PM 10000607 2022/09/02 Syro FR 9953231 2022/09/23 Bookmaker (2D Version) PM 10001087 2022/09/25 Red and Blue Clear 9959380 2022/10/16 Vexaria PM 10000710 2022/10/23 Silent Rush PM 10000880 2022/11/06 Shades of Light in a Transcendent Realm PM 10001024 2022/11/12 Cybernecia Catharsis FR 9979704 2022/12/31 Ignotus FR 9988887 2023/02/01 MANTIS (Arcaea Ultra-Bloodrush VIP) FR 9971327 2023/02/01 overdead.
